race.comment: HEAT MAP (12) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.5 lengths from the winner in second over 1000m at Bendigo. This looks very winnable and she can improve again, go close. MORNING RALPH (2) pushed forward from a wide draw last start and found a position close to the lead before sticking on well to finish third over 1000m at this track. Sets up nicely here and looks a big chance. NAR NAR GOON (3) has not raced since finishing sixth over 1006m at Sale on April 8. Fresh for a new stable with gear changes and worth a market watch. FAKE FICTION (6) returns from a lay-off. Fitter for recent hit-outs, the latest placing in a Burrumbeet jump-out. Opened last campaign with a fourth at Dunkeld over 1000m. In the mix.
